section.heading: Deposits in and disbursements from trust funds

content.p: All cash balances in the United States Government Life Insurance Fund and the National Service Life Insurance Fund on January 1, 1959, together with all moneys thereafter accruing to such funds, including premiums, appropriated moneys, the proceeds of any sales of investments which may be necessary to meet current expenditures, and interest on investments, shall be available for disbursement for meeting all expenditures and making investments authorized to be made from such funds.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1991—Pub. L. 102–83 renumbered section 786 of this title as this section.
